decision_question: Can Procedure-Visual templates reference provisional exercise_operations while PV remains a references/data/procedure-visual overlay?
conditions: PV templates may reference exercise_operations only with explicit provisional status.
PV references do not promote operations to governed operation records.
PV.0 through PV.6 must not create references/machine PV registries.
PV schema, validators, reports, renderer contracts, lesson regressions, and a human promotion gate are required before any machine promotion.
Student-facing projection remains blocked unless a later PV gate explicitly authorizes it for generator-supported or explicitly non-interactive records.
blocked_scope: unreviewed PV projection into generated lesson output
